subject: [PATCH v7 17/20] nfsd: fix reply size estimate for GET_DIR_DELEGATION

2026-06-16.patch_summary: This patch fixes an issue in the NFS server where the estimated reply size for the GET_DIR_DELEGATION operation was too small, leading to a failure to encode the reply and leaving the client without the returned stateid. The fix is to multiply the estimate by the size of a __be32 word, like other _rsize helpers. This ensures that the reply will fit within the session/reply limit.
